system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sproc_rpt110","body":"
CREATE PROC sproc_RPT110(@orderlist nvarchar(200))
AS
DECLARE @ORDER TABLE
(
    masp nvarchar(200),
    soluong_donhang int
)

DECLARE @BOM TABLE
(
    masp nvarchar(200),
    mavt nvarchar(200),
    soluong decimal(18, 5),
    bomtype nvarchar(10)
)

INSERT INTO @ORDER(masp, soluong_donhang)
SELECT item_number, SUM(order_qty) order_qty
FROM   tr_order_detail with(nolock)
WHERE  order_number IN
(
    SELECT dbo.TRIM(value)
    FROM   dbo.fn_Split( @orderlist, ',' )
)
GROUP BY item_number


INSERT INTO @BOM(masp, mavt, soluong, bomtype)
SELECT a.masp, mavt
    , SUM(soluong * b.soluong_donhang) soluong
    , 'NKI' AS BOMTYPE
FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim a WITH(NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN @ORDER b ON a.masp = b.masp
WHERE ISNULL(mavt, '') <> '000'
GROUP BY a.masp, mavt
UNION ALL
SELECT a.masp, madonggoi
    , SUM(soluong * b.soluong_donhang) soluong
    , 'DGO' AS BOMTYPE
FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi a WITH(NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN @ORDER b ON a.masp = b.masp
WHERE ISNULL(madonggoi, '') <> '000'
GROUP BY a.masp, madonggoi
UNION ALL
SELECT a.masp, mact
    , SUM(sl_sp * b.soluong_donhang) soluong
    , 'SON' AS BOMTYPE
FROM tr_dinhmuc_son a WITH(NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN @ORDER b ON a.masp = b.masp
WHERE ISNULL(mact, '') <> '000'
GROUP BY a.masp, mact
--DECLARE @BOMTOTAL TABLE
--(
--    masp nvarchar(200),
--    mavt nvarchar(200),
--    soluong decimal(18, 5),
--    bomtype nvarchar(10)
--)

--INSERT INTO @BOMTOTAL(masp, mavt, bomtype, soluong)
--SELECT A.masp, B.mavt
--    , B.bomtype
--    , soluong = SUM(A.soluong_donhang * B.soluong)
--FROM @ORDER A 
--    LEFT JOIN @BOM B ON A.masp = B.masp
--GROUP BY A.masp, B.mavt, B.bomtype
--ORDER BY A.masp, B.mavt

SELECT A.mavt, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt
    , soluong_can = SUM(A.soluong)
    , soluong_ton = SUM(B.soluong)
    , A.bomtype
FROM @BOM A
    LEFT JOIN tr_tonkho_sum B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
    LEFT JOIN tr_material C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
GROUP BY A.mavt, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, A.bomtype




","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
